items.title: Stack — LIFO
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  TOP["top"]
  F3["frame-3 (last pushed)"]
  F2["frame-2"]
  F1["frame-1 (first pushed)"]
  TOP --> F3 --> F2 --> F1
  P["push / pop happen here"] -.-> F3
items.caption: Push and pop only touch the top. The first item in is the last item out.

items.title: Queue — FIFO
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  FRONT["front (next to dequeue)"]
  A["req-A"] --> B["req-B"] --> C["req-C"] --> BACK["back (next enqueue)"]
  FRONT --> A
items.caption: Enqueue at the back, dequeue from the front. With collections.deque both are O(1).
